creator: mike@FreeBSD.org
text:
Adding to Audit-Trail.

On Sun, Jul 22, 2001 at 12:44:18PM +0200, Fabien THOMAS wrote:
> yes it occurs in all version of FreeBSD after 2.2.8 (3.x and 4.x)
> i didnt remember if i said that before but the slowdown is only on receive 
> not transmit
>

> >Synopsis: 3COM 905B realy realy slow when using multiple adapter
> >
> >State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> >State-Changed-By: mike
> >State-Changed-When: Sat Jul 21 19:29:56 PDT 2001
> >State-Changed-Why:
> >
> >Does this problem still occur in newer versions of FreeBSD,
